form.formComment: Racing well recently. At the latest run 3rd of 7 at this track on March 28 over 905m, 7 len behind Mchale carrying 56kg at $11.80. Before that ran last in a small field at this track on March 13 over 905m, 5 len behind Estrella Fugaz carrying 56kg at $2.50. Nice effort last time so worth following up.

form.formComment: Returns from a 45-day let-up. Last start second last in a small field at this track on February 25 over 1408m, 18 len behind Malibu Knight with 56kg at $18.90. The race before that 6th of 10 at this track on January 14 over 1408m, 12 len behind Cantyoustoptheking carrying 56kg at $42.90. Will be saved up for one last crack.

form.formComment: Second-up. Comes off a 42-day let-up. First-up after three months 6th of 8 at this track on February 28 over 905m, 10 len behind Pops Harper with 55.5kg at $37.20. Previously second-up settled back and ran on when 6th of 10 at Laurel Turf on September 27 over 1106m, 6 len behind Kohoutek with 53.5kg at $18.30. Needs to lift.

form.formComment: Third-up today. Resuming second last in a small field at this track on March 6 over 905m, 18 len behind Noble Ruling carrying 53.5kg at $11.50. Second run from a spell sat on the speed and boxed on steadily 4th of 7 at this track on March 28 over 905m, 7 len behind Mchale carrying 54.5kg at $13.90. Expected to perform well.

form.formComment: Has won previously first-up and resumes here after a break of nine weeks. Finished off last preparation when last of 8 at this track February 6 over 1308m, 20 len behind Fabelman carrying 54kg at $26.70. First up last campaign second last of 12 at Aqueduct Turf November 3 2024 over 1207m, 9 len behind Twisted Filigree carrying 52kg at $59.75. Worth keeping in mind.
